code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut out = ""
  mut have_max = false
  mut running = 0
  mut first_out = true
  while i <= n
    mut flush = false
    if i == n
      flush = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          flush = true
        else
          cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        flush = true
      end
    end
    if flush
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          if not have_max
            running = v
            have_max = true
          else
            if v > running
              running = v
            end
          end
          if first_out
            out = "#{running}"
            first_out = false
          else
            out = "#{out} #{running}"
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
